examples.title: Constructor Overloading Demo
examples.description: Demonstrates default, parameterized, and copy constructors
examples.explanation: Shows three types of constructors being invoked based on how object is created. Default when no args, parameterized when two ints, copy when initializing from another Rectangle object.

examples.title: Member Initializer List Demo
examples.description: Shows efficient initialization using initializer list
examples.explanation: Demonstrates member initializer list syntax. const member 'length' and object members 'p1', 'p2' MUST be initialized using initializer list. Assignment in body would fail for const.

examples.title: Copy Constructor with Deep Copy
examples.description: Demonstrates proper copy constructor for dynamic memory
examples.explanation: Shows deep copy in copy constructor - allocates new memory and copies content. If shallow copy (default), both would share same memory causing double delete error. Also shows copy constructor called when passing object by value to function.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is string length

examples.title: Constructor and Destructor in Inheritance
examples.description: Shows execution order of constructors and destructors in inheritance
examples.explanation: Output order: Base Parameterized → Derived Parameterized. When main returns (destructor): Derived → Base. This reverse order ensures derived class cleanup happens before base class dependencies are removed.
